## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Docs / Screenshots

- [ ] docs and wiki updated if the workflow changed
- [ ] screenshots attached for visible UI or GitHub-facing changes
